ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device from which the data was collected */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the device */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor data */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* Acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "acc_z" REAL /* Acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the X-axis */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the Y-axis */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Gyroscope reading in the Z-axis */,
  "light" INTEGER /* Light sensor reading */,
  "grav_x" REAL /* Gravity in the X-axis */,
  "grav_y" REAL /* Gravity in the Y-axis */,
  "grav_z" REAL /* Gravity in the Z-axis */,
  "linacc_x" REAL /* Linear acceleration in the X-axis */,
  "linacc_y" REAL /* Linear acceleration in the Y-axis */,
  "linacc_z" REAL /* Linear acceleration in the Z-axis */,
  "rotvec_x" REAL /* Rotation vector in the X-axis */,
  "rotvec_y" REAL /* Rotation vector in the Y-axis */,
  "rotvec_z" REAL /* Rotation vector in the Z-axis */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "voice" REAL /* Voice sensor reading */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographical location where the data was collected */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the device at the time of data collection */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., Wearable, IoT Sensor) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Last time the device was synchronized with the server */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with the device */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Current location of the device */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "last_known_ip" TEXT /* Last known IP address of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, researcher, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value that can be recorded by the sensor */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value that can be recorded by the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the request */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
